brand.name: fabrika.flo
brand.vibe: Aesop × The Line × Winston Flowers. Luxury, print-editorial, hand-crafted, exclusive.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-display font-light tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-display font-light tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy.h4: text-lg font-sans font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-text-primary
hierarchy.small: text-sm font-sans font-normal text-text-secondary uppercase tracking-widest
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-sans font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-accent

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous white space, ~1.5x-2x normal spacing. Create a museum/gallery feel.
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 md:px-8

grids.catalog: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6 lg:gap-8

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-text-inverse px-8 py-3.5 font-sans text-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-primary-hover transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-none border border-primary text-primary px-8 py-3.5 font-sans text-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-primary hover:text-text-inverse transition-colors duration-300
buttons.accent: rounded-full bg-accent text-text-primary px-8 py-3.5 font-sans text-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-accent-hover transition-colors

cards.product: group cursor-pointer flex flex-col gap-3 bg-transparent border-none
cards.article: flex flex-col gap-4 border border-border p-6 sm:p-8 hover:border-primary transition-colors

inputs.default: border-b border-border bg-transparent py-3 px-0 font-sans text-text-primary focus:border-primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 transition-colors rounded-none placeholder:text-text-secondary/50
inputs.label: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary mb-1

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-background-glass border-t border-border pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-around items-center
bottom_nav.item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 text-text-secondary hover:text-primary transition-colors

component_styles.tags: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-wider border border-border text-text-secondary rounded-full hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-colors

motifs: Hand-drawn ranunculus/peony line-art SVGs (stroke width 1px, color: primary or accent)
Wax-seal monogram 'f.f' used as an avatar, loading state, or footer seal
visual_enhancers.shadows: Very minimal. Rely on 1px borders and generous spacing instead of drop shadows. Use subtle shadow-sm for sticky headers/bottom navs only.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E8DFD5. Use for dividing sections, framing images, and elegant table lines.
visual_enhancers.loading: Warm ivory shimmer skeletons, not standard dark grays. Monogram fading in/out.

splash.sequence: 1. SVG line-art of peony/ranunculus self-draws (stroke-dasharray). 2. Monogram fades in center. 3. Tagline 'цветочный цех' reveals letter-by-letter.

micro_interactions: Staggered fade-up reveals for grid items on scroll
Subtle image scale up (1.05x) on product card hover within a hidden overflow container
Wine-colored underline expansion (width 0 to 100%) on editorial links hover

page_blueprints.Splash: Full screen Ivory background. Center alignment. SVG drawing animation -> Monogram -> Tagline reveal -> Route to Home.
page_blueprints.Home: Desktop Header / Mobile Hamburger. Hero section: Large signature bouquet image with bold Fraunces typography overlay (or beside it), Primary CTA. Followed by curated collections (horizontal scroll or grid), Editorial articles (bento box), Quick order CTA.
page_blueprints.Catalog: Sticky filter bar (Occasion, Size, Palette, Price) below header. Grid of bouquets (2 col mobile, 4 col desktop). Each item has image (tall aspect ratio 4:5), name (serif), price (sans).
page_blueprints.Product: Large hero image (or Swiper gallery) taking 60% of viewport height on mobile. Product details sheet sliding up or below: Title, Price, Composition ('состав') list, Size/Price options (chips), sticky 'Add to Order' bottom bar.
page_blueprints.Article: Editorial blog layout. Large typography, drop caps, inline images, generous line-height. Author/florist bio at the bottom.
page_blueprints.Cart_Checkout: Clean, distraction-free. List of items. Address input (standardized), Delivery slot picker with map integration (Leaflet), Personal note card (textarea with script font preview), Payment selection.
page_blueprints.Profile: Simple tabs: Orders, Favorites, Addresses. Ivory background, clear typography.
page_blueprints.Login: Telegram-native button as primary. Fallback phone/email login. Minimal layout, focus on the brand monogram.
page_blueprints.AiGuide: Chat interface. Florist AI advisor. Chat bubbles with ivory/wine colors. Suggestions for bouquets based on occasion.
page_blueprints.Admin: Product CRUD, Orders table. Standard dashboard layout but styled with the same design system (ivory background, wine accents).

image_urls.description: Luxurious pink, beige, and red flower bouquet in clear glass vase. Perfect for home page hero.
Luxurious floral bouquet with dark burgundy orchids and pink roses in a chic setting.
Detailed view of burgundy and white Scabiosa flowers with soft bokeh.
Elegant pink and yellow ranunculus in white ceramic vase.
White and purple petaled flower arrangement on white vase.
Pink rose and white baby's breath flowers bouquet.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Apply the exact colors: #FDFBF7 (Ivory bg), #6A1A2B (Burgundy primary), #D5B47B (Champagne accent), #282321 (Deep espresso text). DO NOT USE SLOP PASTEL PINKS OR GENERIC ROSE GOLD.

CRITICAL: Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Must use Fraunces (or Playfair Display) for an editorial, print-magazine look. Ensure you use .js/.jsx conventions in standard React, not TypeScript (.tsx).
CRITICAL: Ensure Mobile-first design for Telegram Mini App (~390px viewport), with elegant scaling for desktop (max 1200px container).
CRITICAL: Create the Monogram SVG for the splash screen (interlocked 'f.f') and animate the drawing of a botanical SVG alongside it.
CRITICAL: Avoid dark themes entirely; the background should be warm ivory throughout.
CRITICAL: Build the Bottom Navigation with glassmorphism over ivory (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80) and subtle wine accent for the active state.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="add-to-cart-btn"`).
CRITICAL: Remove Shadcn default borders and box-shadows. Follow the provided `visual_enhancers` instructions-rely on 1px borders (#E8DFD5) and white space (p-6, p-8) instead of shadows.
CRITICAL: Do not use HTML `<select>` or native date pickers. Use customized UI components that match the luxury aesthetic.
CRITICAL: Implement smooth transitions and micro-animations, especially staggered load animations on the Catalog grid and hover effects on product images.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep styling flat and print-like to match the editorial theme.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) strictly where needed (headers, bottom nav).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
Always use modern button styles matching the brand (pill-shaped primary, sharp secondary).
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
